$description: Font family primitives - Raw font stacks with comprehensive fallbacks. Same across all devices.

sans.value: Inter, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif
sans.description: Primary sans-serif stack - optimized for UI and body text
sans.usage: Body text, UI elements, general content

serif.value: Georgia, Cambria, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif
serif.description: Serif stack for editorial content and quotes

mono.value: 'Fira Code', 'SF Mono', 'Monaco', 'Cascadia Code', 'Courier New', Courier, monospace
mono.description: Monospace stack for code and technical content
mono.usage: Code blocks, technical documentation, terminal output

display.description: Display font for headings - matches sans for consistency

$systemFonts.description: Native system fonts for optimal performance

inter.recommendation: Use variable font for better performance

$performanceOptimization.subset: Load only Latin characters for English content
$performanceOptimization.fallback: Always specify system fonts as fallback
$performanceOptimization.recommendation: Use system fonts for best performance, web fonts for brand consistency

$accessibilityConsiderations.minimumSize: Use at least 16px with all font families
$accessibilityConsiderations.contrast: Test contrast ratios with chosen fonts
$accessibilityConsiderations.lineHeight: Adjust line height based on font (serif needs more)
